name: Chicken a La Theresa
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken in enough white wine to cover for at least 2 hours.
2. In a large skillet, sauté mushrooms and garlic in butter until lightly browned.
3. Add olives and heavy cream to the skillet. Cook over moderately high heat, stirring until the cream is absorbed.
4. Arrange the chicken breasts in a buttered shallow baking dish large enough to hold them in one layer.
5. Spread the mushroom mixture over the breasts.
6. Drizzle with a little wine.
7. Cover the dish with a sheet of buttered wax paper and foil.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes until cooked through.
9. Transfer chicken to a heated platter and garnish with chopped parsley and sauteed cherry tomatoes.
